description: Create all Next.js App Router page and layout files referenced in the architecture — root layout, auth pages, student pages, teacher pages, admin pages, public pages, and API routes
deviation_notes: Added orange theme color system (globals.css + product-guidelines.md) before Phase 4 at user direction. Ported 5 missing lib modules from bus-math-v2 (lib/progress/published-curriculum, lib/teacher/{gradebook,course-overview}, lib/practice/{contract,error-analysis}) and convex/practice_submission.ts that were blocking Convex dev server bundling. Added components/auth/ChangePasswordForm.tsx and components/ui/{button,dropdown-menu,avatar}.tsx (shadcn) for settings page. Lesson page renders stub content — LessonRenderer component is future work.
